message:
Running command: 
# 51m49s CPU / ~14min elapsed. 0th iteration at 40% with 35,070 violations.
# This is EXACTLY the same pattern as DRT1! Great convergence proof.
# At 40% the violation count is 35,070 (same as DRT1's ~35,070 at 40%).
#
# DRT1 0th iteration completed at ~19:07 elapsed
# DRT2 0th iteration: at 40%, elapsed=~6.5min (extrapolating to complete around 16-17min)
#
# This is going very well. Continue monitoring with frequent pipe drains.

for i in $(seq 1 240); do
    sleep 60
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    # Keep draining
    head -c 524288 /proc/1100961/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 2; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71_ODB=$(ls -la "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}' | head -1)
    LATEST_STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT_ODB=$DRT71_ODB FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$LATEST_STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
